titleZh: 国有企业派生董事的义务与责任
titleEn: Obligations and Responsibilities of Directors Assigned by State-Owned Enterprises under the New Company Law
abstractZh: 聚焦国企董事身份安排、忠实勤勉要求和实务中常见的职责边界问题。
abstractEn: Discusses duties of directors designated by SOEs and the practical scope of liability and governance obligations.
